posts.author: C.qhdz (Clau Quiñones)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

To be able to have, as part of the possible actions when creating a workflow, the actions “Create a folder” and “Search a board in a folder”

What are you trying to achieve

This would add great value since many times it is necessary to create a folder-type template with some boards inside and connected to each other

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Clau, I totally see the value here. Having “Create Folder” and “Search Board in Folder” as workflow actions would make template setups much smoother, especially for teams managing multiple interconnected boards. Right now, you often have to create folders manually and then link boards, which can be a bit tedious if you’re setting up recurring projects.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI @C.qhdz
As a workaround, we can use Make to automate this.

With Make, when a new item or project is created, we can:

  • Trigger the automation

  • Create the folder

  • Create the required boards

  • Connect them

  • Place everything in the correct location

posts.author: C.qhdz (Clau Quiñones)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, it really does have a lot of potential

posts.author: C.qhdz (Clau Quiñones)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello!! I tried with make too, but make doesn’t have the option “to create a folder” neither!
